description: Machine-readable list of known consensus, integration, reproduction, and standards gaps that block activation or final vectors for the P2MR SLH-DSA Leaf draft.

gaps.description: Final P2MR leaf hashing rules must be stable before QRS leaf hashes can be treated as consensus vector material.
gaps.evidence_required: Final BIP-360/P2MR TapLeaf or successor leaf-hash definition and regenerated cross-implementation QRS vectors.

gaps.description: Final P2MR branch hashing rules must be stable before QRS Merkle roots can be treated as consensus vector material.
gaps.evidence_required: Final BIP-360/P2MR branch-hash definition and regenerated branch-depth vectors.

gaps.description: Final P2MR future-leaf semantics must define how non-tapscript leaf versions are assigned, parsed, and soft-forked.
gaps.evidence_required: Final BIP-360 future-leaf behavior and conflict review for the QRS leaf version.

gaps.description: The provisional QRS ext_flag value must be reviewed against BIP-341/BIP-360 extension semantics and any competing assignments.
gaps.evidence_required: Final QRS ext_flag assignment, collision review, and regenerated digest vectors.

gaps.description: The current executable vectors test a SigMsg-shaped model, not final Bitcoin Core transaction digest equivalence.
gaps.evidence_required: Final QRS SigMsg definition, Bitcoin Core-shaped transaction serialization, and cross-implementation qrs_msg agreement.

gaps.description: The current QRS validation-path benchmark is a local model and is not Bitcoin Core consensus integration.
gaps.evidence_required: A Bitcoin Core validation-path prototype or review artifact that measures QRS validation in the actual consensus validation flow.

gaps.description: The package currently uses OpenSSL EVP evidence; consensus readiness requires an independently reviewed verifier strategy and cross-backend agreement.
gaps.evidence_required: Second reviewed SLH-DSA-SHA2-128s verifier backend, pinned versions, and matching valid/invalid vector results.

gaps.description: One machine's timing evidence is not global proof of validation-cost behavior.
gaps.evidence_required: Independent quick/standard/full benchmark reproductions across the platform targets in the reproduction matrix.

gaps.description: The bundled libsecp256k1 commit has no reviewed public BIP-340 batch verification API wired by this package.
gaps.evidence_required: Reviewed public batch-Schnorr baseline or explicit reviewer agreement that activation review can proceed without one.

gaps.description: Wallet descriptor, PSBT, hardware-signing, and backup standards for QRS spends are outside this benchmark package.
gaps.evidence_required: Wallet-facing standards or draft guidance for representing, signing, exporting, and recovering QRS leaves.

gaps.description: The Draft intentionally does not propose activation parameters.
gaps.evidence_required: Separate activation proposal only after BIP-360/QRS definitions, Core integration, vectors, and resource accounting are resolved.

gaps.description: Current fixtures are provisional executable structured fixtures, not final serialized consensus vectors.
gaps.evidence_required: Serialized valid and invalid transactions generated from final BIP-360/QRS definitions and checked by at least two implementations.
